leadText: Take Heart (Japanese: ブレイブチャージ Brave Charge) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Phione and one of the signature moves of Manaphy.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Take Heart cures the user of all status conditions and raises its offensive and defensive stats for four turns. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Status PP 10 Agile Strong Power — — — Accuracy —% —% —% Action speed modifier Self -2 -3 +5 Target ? ? ? Additional effect Turns 4 3 5 ? ? ? ? Raises the user's offensive and defensive stats Cures the user of status conditions Raises the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Take Heart raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense stats by one stage each, and heals any non-volatile status conditions the user may have.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user lifts its spirits, healing its own status conditions and raising its offensive and defensive stats. S V The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Take Heart is the last Generation VIII move in index number order .
